docket_entries.description: POS FILED ON SUBPOENA ISSUED AS TO OFFICE OF CITIZEN COMPLAINTS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-2004, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-06-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CALENDAR CONFLICT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTENOT, ALEXIUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHERIFF DEPT (SJOSTRUM) PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF FILED A CLAIM WITH THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ALLEGING MISCONDUCT BY THE S.F. POLICE DEPARTMENT, NOT THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PER ORDER OF COMM, A HEARING FOR THE MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS SCHEDULED FOR 4-5-05 @ 3:30 PM. COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHERIFF DEPT (SJOSTRUM)

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF APR-05-2005, GRANTED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS, FILED BY PLTF. ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTENOT, ALEXIUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHERIFF DEPT (SJOSTRUM) PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
